name: @formation-chat-core/direct-chat-widget-example
description: Minimal Cloudflare chat widget that streams directly from a trusted Haystack agent.

scripts.typecheck: wrangler types --strict-vars=false --check && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p site/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json --noEmit
